# linklint

linklint is a static analyser that flags broken Markdown links in a docs tree.

Run it in CI to catch link rot when files move or get renamed.

## Install

```bash
npm install -g linklint
```

## Usage

Run `linklint ./docs` to scan a directory.

![logo](logo.png)
